kins/agent-working-dir/workspace/Compile_CPU_Win310/mindspore/mindspore/ops/infer/ops_func_impl//batch_norm.cc:80 mindspore::ops::`anonymous-namespace'::BatchNormShapeCheck

llm_operation.reason: TensorFlow BatchNormalization不支持num_features/affine参数；MindSpore BatchNorm1d要求num_features等于输入通道数（x.shape[1]=3），但用例中设为128，导致形状校验失败。
MindSpore BatchNorm1d默认使用NCHW格式，但输入为3D且axis=1对应通道维，需显式设data_format='NCHW'；TF默认axis=1匹配，而MindSpore需确保moving_mean/var初始化与TF训练模式一致，且use_batch_statistics=True对齐训练行为。
MindSpore BatchNorm1d expects 2D input (N, C), but TF case uses 3D (2,3,10); must reshape to (2*10, 3) for equivalent channel-wise normalization along axis=1.
